RETURN MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT MARION COOK.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT JEREMIAH MASOLI'S MOTHER, LINDA MASOLI APPEARS ON HIS BEHALF, COMPLETES SC-109, AND STATES THAT HE IS OUT OF THE COUNTRY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
